entity.summary: Centralized crypto and derivatives exchange operated through Romania-incorporated Lionheart Limited S.R.L according to BitDelta's official terms.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0283. The official general terms identify Lionheart Limited S.R.L as the company governing use of the BitDelta exchange platform and state that it is incorporated under Romanian law.

events.title: BitDelta recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: BitDelta is recorded as a Romania-operated centralized crypto and derivatives exchange based on its official terms, official domain, and CoinGecko exchange source row.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch, licensing, or major operating-history event if stronger dated sources are added.

evidence.title: BitDelta official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify BitDelta identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitDelta
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0283.

evidence.title: BitDelta General Terms and Conditions
evidence.notes: The official terms identify Lionheart Limited S.R.L as the company operating the exchange platform and state that it is incorporated under the laws of Romania.
